aipifyConnection.title: Aipify read-only connection
aipifyConnection.subtitle: Create and manage dedicated read-only keys that let Aipify verify your Unonight organization — never members, messages, or payments.

help.title: About this connection key
help.what: This is a dedicated read-only bearer token for Aipify — not a Supabase service key or database credential.
help.reads: Aipify reads only safe metadata: organization identity, integration status, and approved read-only scopes.
help.notSupabase: Never paste Supabase anon or service-role keys here. Aipify only accepts Unonight-issued read-only connection keys.
help.revoke: Revoke a key here immediately if it may have been exposed. Then remove or update the connection in Aipify Install.
help.connect: Copy the key once, open Aipify Install → Integrations → Unonight, paste the bearer token, and run Test the connection.

reveal.title: Copy your connection key now
reveal.warning: This bearer token is shown only once. Store it securely and paste it into Aipify. It cannot be retrieved again.

table.name: Connection keys
table.empty: No connection keys yet. Create a read-only key to connect Aipify.

errors.generic: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to manage Aipify connection keys.
